metadata.note: Sub-case A2: the named treaty is the gate; primary_target NULL because an AND-gate drops the atomic 34->19 (India-side and Pakistan-side coverage each carry only their own centroid). Pre-audited 2026-07-17. CRITICAL: bare 'Indus' is BANNED -- the EN matcher is word-START, not whole-word, so it catches industry/industrial (37 real vs 409 matched). 'Indus Waters' is a named-treaty phrase (Pillar 3), the one legitimate exception to the atoms-only rule here. DROPPED: 'dam' (word-STARTs into damage/dampen -- 'collateral damage', 'heat damages summer crop'); 'water treaty' (2/3 hits were the GANGES water treaty with Bangladesh); 'canal', 'river flow' too thin/generic. Kishanganga/Baglihar/Ratle/Tarbela/Mangla are n=0 today but kept as dormant named-project anchors -- they are the treaty's actual arbitration subjects and will fire when the dispute moves.
